Package index

Package Overview

modernGLMM modernGLMM-package
modernGLMM: Unified R Workflows for Generalized Linear Mixed Models

Core Data and Examples

Datasets and executable examples from the 2024 GLMM text.

Table1.1
Data for Table1.1 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
Table1.2
Data for Table1.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataExam2.B.2
Data for Example 2.B.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataExam2.B.3
Data for Example 2.B.3 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataExam2.B.4
Data for Example 2.B.4 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataExam2.B.7
Data for Example 2.B.7 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataSet10.1
Data for Example 10.1 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataSet10.2
Data for Example 10.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataSet10.4
Data for Example 10.4 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataSet11.1
Data Set 11.1 - Completely Randomized Count Data
DataSet11.3
Data Set 11.3 - Randomized Complete Block Count Data
DataSet11.4
Data Set 11.4 - Split-Plot Count Data
DataSet12.1
Data for Example 12.1 — Continuous Proportion Dose-Response (Chapter 12)
DataSet12.2
Data for Example 12.2 — Binomial Nested Factorial (Chapter 12)
DataSet14.1
Data for Example 14.1 — Ordinal Proportional Odds GLMM (Chapter 14)
DataSet14.2
Data for Example 14.2 — Non-Proportional Odds: Poinsettia Trial (Chapter 14)
DataSet17.1
Data for Example 17.1 — Crossover with ARH(1) Covariance (Chapter 17)
DataSet17.2
Data for Example 17.2 — Sparse Longitudinal Data with SP(POW) (Chapter 17)
DataSet18.1
Data for Example 18.1 — Alliance Wheat Trial: Gaussian Spatial (Chapter 18)
DataSet18.2
Data for Example 18.2 — Hessian Fly Trial: Binomial Spatial (Chapter 18)
DataSet21.1
Data for Example 21.1 — Power Curve for One-Way ANOVA (Chapter 21)
DataSet3.1
Data for Example 3.1 and Example 3.2 from Generalized Linear Mixed Models: Modern Concepts, Methods and Applications by Stroup, Ptukhina, and Garai (2024, 2nd ed.)
DataSet3.2
